design_validity_audit.interpretation: A pass means each frozen hidden target is publicly manipulable, covered by the Gate A recipes, observable before termination, instantiable, and absent from the mechanism-Agent prompt. It does not establish identifiability.

checks.detail: Every frozen recipe must contain a public measurement before termination.
The no-change twin must have no hidden intervention.
Each certification cell must change exactly one hidden law family.
The task must reset under the declared intervention.

At least one public control implicated by the hidden law must vary across frozen recipes; varied=[{'operation': 'set_potential', 'field': 'potential_V'}, {'operation': 'set_potential', 'field': 'current_mA'}, {'operation': 'set_potential', 'field': 'electrolyte_profile'}].
Each certification cell must change exactly one hidden law family.
The task must reset under the declared intervention.
Supported material targets are ['catalyst', 'electrolyte_profile', 'solvent'].
set_potential.electrolyte_profile must be available to the Agent in electrochemical-conversion.
A relational counterfactual needs at least two public choices; choices=[0, 1, 2, 3].
All moved public indices must be legal; moved=[0, 2], choices=[0, 1, 2, 3].
Frozen Gate A recipes must exercise every moved index; moved=[0, 2], covered=[0, 1, 2, 3].
Forbidden intervention keys in prompt=[].
Every frozen recipe must contain a public measurement before termination.
The no-change twin must have no hidden intervention.
Each certification cell must change exactly one hidden law family.
The task must reset under the declared intervention.

At least one public control implicated by the hidden law must vary across frozen recipes; varied=[{'operation': 'heat', 'field': 'target_temperature_K'}, {'operation': 'heat', 'field': 'duration_s'}].
Each certification cell must change exactly one hidden law family.
The task must reset under the declared intervention.

At least one public control implicated by the hidden law must vary across frozen recipes; varied=[{'operation': 'add_catalyst', 'field': 'catalyst'}, {'operation': 'heat', 'field': 'target_temperature_K'}].
Each certification cell must change exactly one hidden law family.
The task must reset under the declared intervention.
Supported material targets are ['catalyst', 'electrolyte_profile', 'solvent'].
add_catalyst.catalyst must be available to the Agent in reaction-to-crystallization.
A relational counterfactual needs at least two public choices; choices=[0, 1, 2, 3].
All moved public indices must be legal; moved=[1, 2], choices=[0, 1, 2, 3].
Frozen Gate A recipes must exercise every moved index; moved=[1, 2], covered=[0, 1, 2, 3].
Forbidden intervention keys in prompt=[].

interpretation: A pass establishes budgeted identifiability for this evaluator-side oracle; it does not establish that any evaluated Agent discovers the mechanism.

public_feature_contract.encoding: sorted flattened values with finite-value masks; non-finite values replaced by zero
public_feature_contract.fixed_trajectory_action_source: first actions in the frozen deterministic action library
public_feature_contract.source: agent-visible numeric observation and reward after every compiled public recipe operation
